summary: Complete testing of P0 features: City/Near Me toggle discovery on landing page, 5-step Concierge Booking Flow with new RM selection (Step 3), GET /api/rms/available endpoint, and selected_rm_id saved in booking. All 13 backend tests + full frontend E2E flow passed.

minor.issue: Venues with city='Delhi' (not 'Delhi NCR') generated BMV-IND-XXX booking IDs instead of BMV-DEL-XXX. Fixed: Added 'Delhi', 'New Delhi', 'Gurgaon', 'Noida' to CITY_CODES in booking.py

issues: Pre-existing: DialogTitle accessibility warning - should wrap with VisuallyHidden for screen readers
Step 1/4 Continue button lacks data-testid='step1-continue-btn' (makes automated testing harder; use JS evaluate workaround)

action_items: Consider adding data-testid='step-continue-btn' to the generic Continue button in EnquiryForm navigation for better testability
Consider adding DialogTitle with VisuallyHidden to EnquiryForm for accessibility
critical_code_review_comments: CITY_CODES in booking.py was missing 'Delhi', 'New Delhi', 'Gurgaon', 'Noida' - fixed in this iteration
EnquiryForm Continue button (steps 1, 4) has no data-testid - minor testability gap
updated_files: /app/backend/routes/booking.py (CITY_CODES - added Delhi, New Delhi, Gurgaon, Noida)
seed_data_creation: Multiple test booking requests with selected RM IDs (BMV-IND-000001 with rm_id=user_7d7f26135975/Priya Singh)
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 features fully working: 1) Landing page has City/Near Me toggle (data-testid mode-city/mode-nearby), city dropdown loads from API, Explore Venues navigates to /venues/search. 2) EnquiryForm now has 5 steps - Step 3 is Choose Your RM, auto-advances from OTP, fetches 3 RMs from /api/rms/available with data-testid=rm-card-{user_id}, selection highlights with gold border+checkmark, Confirm & Continue button. 3) selected_rm_id stored in lead correctly. Continue button on step 1/4 has no data-testid - use JS evaluate to click. Cities in dropdown: Delhi, Mumbai, Gurgaon, Noida (from API).

backend.GET /api/rms/available: PASS - Returns 3 RMs with user_id, name, rating, specialties (no password_hash or _id)
backend.POST /api/booking-requests with selected: PASS - Uses selected RM, rm_name matches
backend.POST /api/booking-requests with invalid: PASS - Falls back to auto-assign gracefully
backend.Booking appears in admin leads: PASS - rm_id and rm_name correctly stored

frontend.Landing page City/Near Me toggle: PASS - Both mode-city and mode-nearby present
frontend.City mode dropdown: PASS - search-city dropdown loads cities from API
frontend.Explore Venues navigation: PASS - Navigates to /venues/search with city param
frontend.EnquiryForm 5-step display: PASS - Step X of 5 shown correctly
frontend.Step 2 OTP Verify: PASS - OTP sent/verified, auto-advances to Step 3
frontend.Step 3 Choose Your RM: PASS - 3 RM cards with rm-card-{user_id} test-ids
frontend.Confirm & Continue button: PASS - Text changes to 'Confirm & Continue' when RM selected
frontend.Step 4 Event Details: PASS - Event type, guest count, date fields work
frontend.Submit booking with selected_rm_id: PASS - selected_rm_id saved in lead (verified via admin API)
frontend.Success screen: PASS - Shows 'YOUR SELECTED EXPERT' label, booking ref, RM name
